blockers.message: Cloudflare remote Pages/D1 project, deployment, and secret inspection is blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set and Wrangler is not logged in.
blockers.next_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or reconnect a Cloudflare connector that exposes Pages/D1 read tools.

blockers.message: Live /api/health reports Google Drive client email and private key credential parts missing, so real Drive upload/download cannot be verified.
blockers.next_action: Add GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY in Cloudflare Pages production, then rerun Drive probe/upload/download.
